root.rep_text: รายการเกี่ยวกับการตรวจนับครุภัณฑ์ (ตามประเภทวัสดุ)>>คีย์ชื่อ-สกุล กับ ตำแหน่งเอง

sle_name1.text: ผู้ตรวจนับ 1

sle_name2.text: ผู้ตรวจนับ 2

sle_name3.text: ผู้ตรวจนับ 3

sle_name4.text: ผู้ตรวจนับ 4

combo.sc_acc_m_ucf_type_exp: SELECT type_exp as item_code, type_exp||' '||type_name as item_desc FROM sc_acc_m_ucf_type_exp

root.sql: select sc_acc_m_expire.material_id, sc_acc_m_expire.description, sc_acc_m_expire.rate_expire, sc_acc_m_expire.amount_value, sc_acc_m_expire.first_used_day, sc_acc_m_expire.first_expire_year, sc_acc_m_expire.entry_id, sc_acc_m_expire.accu_expire_amount, sc_acc_m_expire.last_cal_used, sc_acc_m_expire.cal_id, sc_acc_m_expire.cal_id_date, sc_acc_m_expire.entry_date, sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old, sc_acc_m_expire.remark, sc_acc_m_expire.balance, sc_acc_m_expire.shelf_id, sc_acc_m_expire.type_exp, sc_acc_m_ucf_type_exp.type_name, sc_acc_m_ucf_type_exp.type_exp, '!sle_name1_1!' as sle_name1, '!sle_position1_1!' as sle_position1, '!sle_name2_1!' as sle_name2, '!sle_position2_1!' as sle_position2, '!sle_name3_1!' as sle_name3, '!sle_position3_1!' as sle_position3, '!sle_name4_1!' as sle_name4, '!sle_position4_1!' as sle_position4 from sc_acc_m_expire, sc_acc_m_ucf_type_exp where ( sc_acc_m_expire.type_exp = sc_acc_m_ucf_type_exp.type_exp ) /*and ( ( sc_acc_m_expire.first_used_day between :adtm_begindate and :adtm_enddate )*/ and ( sc_acc_m_expire.balance > 0 ) /*and ( sc_acc_m_expire.type_exp in ( :as_type )*/ and ( sc_acc_m_expire.cut_paid_status = 0 ) /*WHERE*/ group by sc_acc_m_expire.material_id, sc_acc_m_expire.description, sc_acc_m_expire.rate_expire, sc_acc_m_expire.amount_value, sc_acc_m_expire.first_used_day, sc_acc_m_expire.first_expire_year, sc_acc_m_expire.entry_id, sc_acc_m_expire.accu_expire_amount, sc_acc_m_expire.last_cal_used, sc_acc_m_expire.cal_id, sc_acc_m_expire.cal_id_date, sc_acc_m_expire.entry_date, sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old, sc_acc_m_expire.remark, sc_acc_m_expire.balance, sc_acc_m_expire.shelf_id, sc_acc_m_expire.type_exp, sc_acc_m_ucf_type_exp.type_name, sc_acc_m_ucf_type_exp.type_exp order by sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old
